text: Persist and expose current supervisor engine state in project-local runtime metadata
description: Extend .bowman/runtime watchdog metadata so the current supervisor state-engine state and its color can be recovered after reconnects, reloads, and backend restarts. The frontend should be able to render the last known real supervisor state before a fresh socket event arrives.

status.comment: Follow-up to current UI work: durable runtime metadata still does not include the actual supervisor state-machine state.
